languages.text: "Знамя династии... Блюститель... Ло-о-о-ринх!" {n}Он стонет свое имя, но взгляд тут же становится обескураженным — он уже забыл его вновь.{/n} "Пр... проверить арсе-е-енал! Династии... разящий меч и о-оплот! Отдал жизнь... потому что... мой долг. Мой долг..."

"The dynasty's banner... Enforcer... Lorrrinque!" {n}He speaks his name in a drawn-out groan, but then confusion immediately clouds his gaze — he seems to have forgotten it again.{/n} "Ch... check the arsenaaal! The slashing sword and... bulwark of the dynasty! I gave my life... because of... my duty. My duty..."
languages.original_text: "Знамя династии... Блюститель... Ло-о-о-ринх!" {n}Он стонет свое имя, но взгляд тут же становится обескураженным — он уже забыл его вновь.{/n} "Пр... проверить арсе-е-енал! Династии... разящий меч и о-оплот! Отдал жизнь... потому что... мой долг. Мой долг..."

The slashing sword and... bulwark of the dynasty! I gave my life... because of... my duty. My duty..."

The slashing sword and... bulwark of the dynasty! I gave my life... because of... my duty. My duty..."

languages.text: 「私は王朝を守る剣、盾、そして武器である、執行官ロリンケ。王国の民を守るために命を捧げた。それは私の義務。私の義務…」
languages.original_text: "I am Enforcer Lorinque, weapon of the dynasty, its slashing sword and bulwark. I gave my life for its subjects because it is my duty. My duty..."

traits.locale_text: 「私は王朝を守る剣、盾、そして武器である、執行官ロリンケ。王国の民を守るために命を捧げた。それは私の義務。私の義務…」

languages.text: “王朝的旗帜……执法者……洛——林克！”{n}他拖长声音喊出自己的名字，但困惑很快再次蒙上他的目光——他似乎又忘记了。{/n}“检……检查军械库！我是王朝斩出的利剑和……壁垒！我献出了生命……因为这是……我的职责。我的职责……”
languages.original_text: "The dynasty's banner... Enforcer... Lorrrinque!" {n}He speaks his name in a drawn-out groan, but then confusion immediately clouds his gaze — he seems to have forgotten it again.{/n} "Ch... check the arsenaaal! The slashing sword and... bulwark of the dynasty! I gave my life... because of... my duty. My duty..."

traits.locale_text: “王朝的旗帜……执法者……洛——林克！”{n}他拖长声音喊出自己的名字，但困惑很快再次蒙上他的目光——他似乎又忘记了。{/n}“检……检查军械库！我是王朝斩出的利剑和……壁垒！我献出了生命……因为这是……我的职责。我的职责……”

languages.text: « La bannière de la dynastie... Prévôt... Lorrrinque ! » {n}Il prononce son nom dans un long grognement, puis la confusion revient lui embrumer le regard : il semble l'avoir de nouveau oublié.{/n} « Vé... vérifiez l'aaarsenal ! La lame qui fend l'air... le rempart de la dynastie ! J'ai donné ma vie... car c'était mon... mon devoir. Mon devoir... »
languages.original_text: "The dynasty's banner... Enforcer... Lorrrinque!" {n}He speaks his name in a drawn-out groan, but then confusion immediately clouds his gaze — he seems to have forgotten it again.{/n} "Ch... check the arsenaaal! The slashing sword and... bulwark of the dynasty! I gave my life... because of... my duty. My duty..."

traits.locale_text: « La bannière de la dynastie... Prévôt... Lorrrinque ! » {n}Il prononce son nom dans un long grognement, puis la confusion revient lui embrumer le regard : il semble l'avoir de nouveau oublié.{/n} « Vé... vérifiez l'aaarsenal ! La lame qui fend l'air... le rempart de la dynastie ! J'ai donné ma vie... car c'était mon... mon devoir. Mon devoir... »

languages.text: «El estandarte de la dinastía... Guardia... ¡Lorrrinque!». {n}Pronuncia su nombre con un gemido, y acto seguido la confusión nubla su mente y parece volver a olvidarlo.{/n} «Co... Comprobar el arsenaaal! ¡La espada cortante y... el baluarte de la dinastía! Di mi vida... por... mi deber. Mi deber...».
languages.original_text: "The dynasty's banner... Enforcer... Lorrrinque!" {n}He speaks his name in a drawn-out groan, but then confusion immediately clouds his gaze — he seems to have forgotten it again.{/n} "Ch... check the arsenaaal! The slashing sword and... bulwark of the dynasty! I gave my life... because of... my duty. My duty..."

traits.locale_text: «El estandarte de la dinastía... Guardia... ¡Lorrrinque!». {n}Pronuncia su nombre con un gemido, y acto seguido la confusión nubla su mente y parece volver a olvidarlo.{/n} «Co... Comprobar el arsenaaal! ¡La espada cortante y... el baluarte de la dinastía! Di mi vida... por... mi deber. Mi deber...».

languages.text: "Hanedanlığın sancağı... İnfazcı... Lorrrinque!" {n}Adını uzun, iniltili bir şekilde söylüyor ancak sonra bakışları anında bulanıklaşıyor. Görünüşe göre adını yine unutmuş.{/n} "Ce... Cephaneliği kontrol et! Hanedanlığın kesen kılıcı ve... Siperi! Hayatımı verdim... Görevim... Yüzünden. Görevim..."
languages.original_text: "The dynasty's banner... Enforcer... Lorrrinque!" {n}He speaks his name in a drawn-out groan, but then confusion immediately clouds his gaze — he seems to have forgotten it again.{/n} "Ch... check the arsenaaal! The slashing sword and... bulwark of the dynasty! I gave my life... because of... my duty. My duty..."

traits.locale_text: "Hanedanlığın sancağı... İnfazcı... Lorrrinque!" {n}Adını uzun, iniltili bir şekilde söylüyor ancak sonra bakışları anında bulanıklaşıyor. Görünüşe göre adını yine unutmuş.{/n} "Ce... Cephaneliği kontrol et! Hanedanlığın kesen kılıcı ve... Siperi! Hayatımı verdim... Görevim... Yüzünden. Görevim..."

languages.text: "Das Banner der Dynastie ... Enforcer ... Lorrrinque!" {n}Er sagt seinen Namen mit einem gedehnten Stöhnen, ehe Verwirrung seines Verstand trübt ... er scheint ihn schon wieder vergessen zu haben.{/n} "Ü... überprüft das Arsenaaaal! Waffe der Dynastie ... ihr Schwert und Bollwerk! Ich gab mein Leben ... weil es ... meine Pflicht ist. Meine Pflicht ..."
languages.original_text: "The dynasty's banner... Enforcer... Lorrrinque!" {n}He speaks his name in a drawn-out groan, but then confusion immediately clouds his gaze — he seems to have forgotten it again.{/n} "Ch... check the arsenaaal! The slashing sword and... bulwark of the dynasty! I gave my life... because of... my duty. My duty..."
